title: European Patient Master Patient Index - Identity Resolution
problem: European healthcare lacks unified patient identity across providers and insurers. Each country has different systems with limited interoperability.
solution: National and regional Master Patient Index (MPI) systems. Patient identification and matching across healthcare organizations. Foundation for eligibility verification and claims processing.
technology: MPI, patient matching algorithms, identity management
target_customer: Healthcare systems, insurers, national health agencies
traction_signals: National MPI initiatives in multiple EU countries
varden_fit: HIGH — Patient identity is foundation for eligibility. European MPIs exist but lack integration with payer eligibility systems.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Patient identity infrastructure is unsexy but essential. European systems are fragmented.
